# Task Profile: Bugfix

Use this profile with `docs/templates/tasks/task.template.md`.

## Required Focus

- expected behavior
- actual behavior
- reproduction or why reproduction is unavailable
- root cause or fix hypothesis
- regression coverage
- verification result
